name: Jay - OC
description:
My silly ol' OC Jay.

He goes by any pronouns [I js like using he/him when writing him.]

He likes nature, cats, music, and art!

He dislikes tea, and crowded/loud places

He has an obsession with reptiles [his favorite reptile are snakes!]

He has dark brown eyes, brown medium length hair, and beige(?) skin

Under his black jacket... HE'S WEARING A MAID DRESS HAHA! Oh and he's wearing red heart boxers under those damn black sweatpants

He's a joke OC I made lol, bully him all you want he deserves it alot

6'2 btw hehe.
creator: SHARKIEY09
